response.justification: While the candidate brings 18+ years of software engineering experience and demonstrated performance optimization skills, this Principal role requires specialized hardware architecture expertise—specifically SoC/IP modeling, GPU architecture analysis, and deep learning workload optimization—that is entirely absent from the resume. The career has been exclusively software-focused, lacking the fundamental hardware design and hardware-software co-design background essential for a principal-level performance architect at an AI accelerator company.
strengths: 18+ years of diverse software engineering with strong C/C++ and low-level systems programming background
Proven experience optimizing performance-critical systems (low-latency microservices, asynchronous I/O, real-time databases at Dunnhumby)
Recent exposure to AI infrastructure and agentic systems at Naver shows some engagement with AI ecosystem
concerns: No SoC, IP modeling, or hardware design experience—the core technical requirement for this role
No GPU architecture, microarchitecture analysis, or deep neural network optimization specialization
Career trajectory is entirely software and application-focused; lacks hardware-software co-design expertise needed at principal level

key_factors.factor: SoC/IP Modeling and Hardware Design Expertise
AI Accelerator and GPU Architecture Knowledge
Performance Optimization and Systems Tuning Experience
